title: ANIMAL ADOPTION - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers adoption of dogs and cats that the humane society takes in, cares for, and houses at the no-kill shelter. All animals that are adopted out have been spayed and neutered. 429 NW Scenic Drive Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday noon-4pm Email (541) 479-5154 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-5154 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or walk-in for information and available animals. Intakes: Call for appointment. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Adoptions: rental agreement Intakes: Previous veterinarian records AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Travel North on 7th Street, continue underneath the overpass, and turn right at Scoville Road. Turn left at Scenic Drive. Continue and turn left at the sign for Rogue Valley Humane Society. Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET RESOURCES DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SPAY AND NEUTER VOUCHER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY
